description:
Your Jurism library contains several landmark US Supreme Court cases. Create bidirectional 'Related' links between the following three pairs of cases:

1. 'Brown v. Board of Education' and 'Tinker v. Des Moines Independent Community School District'
2. 'Gideon v. Wainwright' and 'Miranda v. Arizona'
3. 'New York Times Co. v. Sullivan' and 'Tinker v. Des Moines Independent Community School District'

pairs: New York Times Co. v. Sullivan
